steps.title: Match slopes with different intercepts
steps.content: For no solution, the second equation needs the same slope but a different constant. Choice B: $\frac{1}{3}x=4y$ scales to $x=12y$, same slope, different constant.

steps.title: Identify the choice
steps.content: Choice B, $\frac{1}{3}x=4y$, simplifies to $x=12y$. It has the same slope relationship as $x=12y-15$ but a different constant, so the two lines are parallel and never intersect. That matches choice B — B is correct.
